title: Replace static maps with interactive Leaflet maps and add hover, edit/delete, and zoom features

requirements.text: Replace static map images with interactive Leaflet maps using OpenStreetMap tiles in both WorldMapPage and ATMapPage components

quotes: I don't want a static image of a map. I want an interactive and accurate map that shows the pinpointed spots. This source might be able to be put to use: Leaflet | © OpenStreetMap contributors

acceptanceCriteria: WorldMapPage renders an interactive Leaflet map with OpenStreetMap tiles
ATMapPage renders an interactive Leaflet map with OpenStreetMap tiles focused on the Appalachian Trail region
Existing entry pins are displayed on the Leaflet maps at their correct coordinates
Map tiles properly attribute OpenStreetMap contributors

requirements.text: Display place name on hover over map pinpoints

quotes: Could the place name be included with the pinpoint during hover-over?

acceptanceCriteria: Hovering over a map pin displays the decoded place name from the entry
Tooltip appears immediately on hover and disappears on mouse leave
Place name is extracted using the existing decodePlaceNameFromComment utility

requirements.text: Add edit and delete abilities to guestbook entries

quotes: Can we add an 'edit' and/or 'delete' abilities to entries?

acceptanceCriteria: Backend implements a delete entry operation that removes entries by ID
Users can delete their own entries from the entry detail page
EditEntryDialog functionality is accessible from appropriate locations in the UI
Delete operations are protected so users can only delete their own entries
After deletion, user is redirected to the feed and the entry is removed from all views

requirements.text: Remove the generic hiking trail logo from the AT pin board

quotes: Remove the generic hiking trail logo on the 'AT' pin board

acceptanceCriteria: ATMapPage no longer displays a static hiking trail logo image
The map area is clean and focuses on the interactive Leaflet map

requirements.text: Use actual map backgrounds for both World and AT boards that correspond to the pinned points

quotes: Instead, for both the 'World' and 'AT', could we have an actual map as the background that corresponds to the points pinned?

acceptanceCriteria: WorldMapPage displays a real OpenStreetMap background centered on existing pins
ATMapPage displays a real OpenStreetMap background focused on the Appalachian Trail region
Maps automatically adjust their view to show all pinned locations when entries exist
Empty maps show a sensible default view (world view for World map, AT region for AT map)

requirements.text: Add zoom in/out functionality to both interactive maps

quotes: Allow for the ability to zoom in/out on the maps

acceptanceCriteria: Both WorldMapPage and ATMapPage support mouse wheel zoom
Maps include visible zoom control buttons (+ and -)
Zoom functionality works smoothly and maintains pin positions
Zoom levels are appropriate for viewing individual pins and overall geography

constraints: Use Leaflet with OpenStreetMap tiles for interactive maps
Preserve existing entry data structure and backend functionality
Maintain the encoded place-name system in comments using existing utilities
Keep the current MapPin component styling consistent with new interactive map markers
nonGoals: Changing the overall application layout or navigation structure
Modifying the add entry form or place search functionality
Adding new map providers beyond OpenStreetMap
